g.text: Changes happen while client receives them normally
Client network drops at rev 45 (knows last_rev = 45)

text.tspan: u2192 server streams any event AFTER rev 42
Network or process restart; client lost connection.
Server checks: do I still have events from rev 46?
u2022 if YES u2192 replay 46u201371, then resume live stream
u2022 if NO (compacted) u2192 send 'gone' error;
Subject to retention: as long as the change-history
still covers (last_rev, now], the client never misses an event.
This is why etcd / ZK / Kafka all maintain a recent change log
